issue.body:
## 📊 Daily Status Report — 2026-04-01

> **guitarrapc/githubactions-lab** · GitHub Actions CI Lab

---

## 🔥 Highlights

- **New feature landed today**: Agentic workflow support added ([`feat: add agentic workflow`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/commit/fe486b1d822e6cd811759642090896607a2bc95e))
- **[PR #306](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/306) merged** (`ci: llm`) — LLM-related CI workflow added
- **⚠️ Workflow failure**: Daily Repo Status Report failed earlier today (see [issue #307](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/307)), now re-running successfully

---

## 🔄 Recent Activity (Last 7 Days)

### Commits (Today)
| Time | Author | Message |
|------|--------|---------|
| 06:51 UTC | github-actions[bot] | `[auto commit] update context (push)` |
| 06:50 UTC | @guitarrapc | [`feat: add agentic workflow`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/commit/fe486b1d822e6cd811759642090896607a2bc95e) |
| 05:53 UTC | @guitarrapc | [`chore: remove push trigger`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/commit/b6d49a0f26322e4684339fd1b0de6cc3340e733f) |
| 03:57 UTC | @guitarrapc | [Merge PR #306 `ci: llm`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/commit/8647b50e1a4cbb9cebcfd5efdeb47bd346b388dc) |
| 03:47 UTC | @guitarrapc | [`chore: ignore too strong warning`](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/commit/0cc29e3a7830585cb926350986d2a37dfc16a589) |

### Pull Requests

**Open (1)**
| PR | Title | Author | Updated |
|----|-------|--------|---------|
| [#305](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/305) | `chore(deps): bump the dependencies group with 2 updates` | `@dependabot`[bot] | 2026-03-31 |

**Recently Merged**
| PR | Title | Merged |
|----|-------|--------|
| [#306](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/306) | `ci: llm` | 2026-04-01 |
| [#304](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/304) | `chore(deps): bump 3 dependencies` | 2026-03-18 |
| [#303](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/303) | `chore(deps): bump 2 dependencies` | 2026-03-11 |
| [#302](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/302) | `feat: change bash to js action for signed commit` | 2026-02-25 |

---

## 🐛 Open Issues (3)

| # | Title | Labels | Updated |
|---|-------|--------|---------|
| [#307](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/307) | ⚠️ [aw] Daily Repo Status Report failed | `agentic-workflows` | 2026-04-01 |
| [#8](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/8) | Playground comment run | `no-stale`, `Stale` | 2025-12-13 |
| [#7](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/7) | Sample: not stale | `no-stale` | 2025-11-03 |

> Issues #7 and #8 are long-running sample/playground issues, not actionable.

---

## 📦 Latest Release

**[Ver.2025.12.14](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/releases/tag/2025.12.14)** — Published 2025-12-13
- Fixed context dump not working; added release context
- Last release was ~3.5 months ago

---

## 📈 Project Status

| Area | Status |
|------|--------|
| Dependency updates | ✅ Active (Dependabot, #305 pending) |
| CI workflows | ✅ Active (LLM + agentic workflows added today) |
| Documentation | ✅ Up to date |
| Releases | ⚠️ No release since Dec 2025 (~3.5 months) |
| Open issues | ✅ Low (3 open, 2 are samples) |

---

## ✅ Recommended Next Steps

1. **Merge [PR #305](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/pull/305)** — Dependency bump (dorny/paths-filter 3→4, actions/create-github-app-token), no blockers visible.
2. **Close [Issue #307](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/307)** — The workflow failure that triggered it is now resolved (this report is the re-run).
3. **Consider a new release** — Significant features have landed since `2025.12.14` (agentic workflows, LLM CI, signed commit actions, container jobs, etc.).
4. **Review agentic workflow setup** — The new agentic workflow added today may need documentation updates.

---
